title: UKNHCC: annual report 2023 and 2024
body: "This is the third annual report of the UK Nutrition and Health Claims Committee (UKNHCC). It provides a summary of the work of the UKNHCC in 2023 and 2024.  The UKNHCC did not meet in 2023, since it did not receive any new nutrition or health claim applications.  This annual report includes:   a foreword from the chair members’ biographies members’ declarations of interest   "
